approvedFiles.reason: The June 2025 official threshold table is represented by all three Core and all three Extended option rows; option codes, component variants, maxima and monotonic thresholds passed deterministic checks.
Each available June overall qualification row is source-located, hashed, monotonic and uses the A-E scale without A*.
Each available June overall qualification row is source-located, hashed and matches the fixed three-component route.
Every represented June series contains all six valid pairs of Y542-Y545 together with mandatory Y540 and Y541; hashes, maxima and monotonic thresholds passed deterministic checks.
Each available June overall qualification row is source-located, hashed and matches the fixed three-component route.
The available official AS overall rows are source-located and hashed; the A-E scale contains no invented A* threshold.

All 45 June 2025 overall option rows are transcribed from the official table: 31 A Level route rows, P4, P3 and twelve standard AS rows. Option codes, component variants, maxima and monotonic thresholds passed deterministic checks; P3/P4 retain a separate special-composite route and are not silently treated as a standard syllabus route.
